common.name: Name
common.confirm_remove:
Remove "{{name}}" from My Trips?

This won't delete the trip, you can access it again via the share link.

home.subtitle: Your events & trips
home.emptyDescription: Create a new trip, access one via a shared link, or sign in to access your trips from anywhere
home.localTripsNote: Your trip links are saved on this device only. Sign in to access them from anywhere.

dashboard.noTripSelected: No trip selected. Please select a trip to view the dashboard.

manage.currencySaveError: An error occurred while saving currency settings.

report.title: Report an Issue
report.subtitle: Found a bug or have feedback? Let us know and we'll look into it.
report.subject: Subject

bank.title: Bank Details
bank.description: Add your bank details so others can see where to send payments in settlement plans.
bank.savedDesc: Your bank details have been updated.
bank.addBankDetailsDesc: Others will see your account info in settlement plans, making it easy to send payments.
bank.bankAppNotice: Banks don't allow apps to pre-fill payments directly. Copy the details above and paste them in your bank app — or tap a shortcut below to open it.

settings.openInstantly: Open instantly from your phone — no browser needed
settings.worksLikeApp: Works like a regular app — no browser needed
settings.iosStep1: Tap the Share button (the box with the arrow) at the bottom of Safari
settings.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
settings.androidStep1: Tap the three dots (⋮) in Chrome's top-right corner
settings.genericInstall: Open your browser menu and look for "Add to Home Screen" or "Install app".
settings.homePageHint: Make sure you're on the home page when you do this, so the app always opens in the right place.
